name: Tn Golf Station
about: Tn Golf Station is an indoor golf facility that features state-of-the-art simulators for year-round play. The venue combines golf with a social atmosphere, offering food, drinks, and a space for both casual and serious play. It provides a realistic golfing experience suitable for practicing or enjoying rounds with friends, with a focus on creating a fun and accessible environment. Their operating hours extend on Mondays and Sundays until the end of NFL games, and the venue also hosts special events like partner drawings and tournaments.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round indoor golf with state-of-the-art simulators
Social atmosphere combining golf with food and drinks
Extended hours on NFL game days for flexible play
Special events and partner drawings for community engagement

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen and food menu available
Full bar service with cold beer and cocktails

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While not specified, it is common practice at indoor golf facilities to allow players to bring their own clubs or use rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: The venue offers its own food and drink menu, including a full bar, so external food and drink may not be permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified, but typical indoor golf simulator rounds take 1.5-2 hours depending on player skill and group size.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Tn Golf Station is described as a fun place for everyone, and its casual atmosphere suggests it is welcoming to families.
